Depends who you want as to build around. A balanced line up is 1 DPS / 2 Assists / 1 Defender until you have more units to build different team comps. If it's Caros, then you have a Caros DPS (Sorel or Helot), 2 Assists (Ramona + Leigh or Aigis), and a defender (Ogier or Agrippa). Similar thing if you want to play Daffodil with the basic team set up
